articles.title: Newcastle collapse at Nou Camp as Barcelona score seven
articles.summary: Newcastle undergo a second-half collapse at the Nou Camp as they lose 7-2 on the night and 8-3 on aggregate to Barcelona in the last 16 of the Champions League.
